verdict.summary: Guide is broadly accurate and useful, but it slightly over-simplifies SNS access for people without residence status, has a likely wrong UMP URL, and should add a few regulatory/consumer caveats.

issues.current: Если у вас нет ВНЖ и número de utente, не говорите “я не имею права на SNS”. Это неверно: доступ к SNS имеет отдельные правила. Misericórdia может принять вас как частного/социального пациента, но параллельно оформляйте número de utente в Centro de Saúde.
issues.problem: The general idea is right, but the wording is too broad. A foreigner without a residence permit and without an SNS number does not automatically have the same SNS access or the same ability to obtain a número de utente as a resident. Access depends on legal residence/legal stay, EU status, visa type, proof of residence in Portugal, urgent/essential care, public-health situations, pregnancy, minors, etc.; some care can be billed at full tariff. The text may make readers think anyone without a residence permit can simply register at a Centro de Saúde.
issues.suggestion: Write more precisely: “Даже без ВНЖ доступ к SNS не равен ‘нет права на помощь’: экстренная помощь, беременность, дети, инфекционные/общественно-значимые ситуации и некоторые другие случаи имеют отдельные правила. Но полноценная регистрация и получение número de utente зависят от статуса и документов: residence permit/CRUE/виза/доказательство проживания, а при отсутствии легального статуса могут попросить atestado da Junta de Freguesia о проживании более 90 дней; часть услуг могут выставить к оплате. Уточняйте в Centro de Saúde и SNS 24.”
issues.source: SNS 24 — Inscrição no Centro de Saúde / acesso de cidadãos estrangeiros; Decreto-Lei n.º 52/2022; Despacho n.º 25360/2001

issues.problem: This is likely not the canonical website of União das Misericórdias Portuguesas. The commonly used official/canonical domain is ump.pt. If the listed domain does not redirect reliably, readers may hit a dead or non-authoritative reference.
issues.suggestion: Use the canonical URL: “https://www.ump.pt” and, if possible, link directly to the directory/search page for Misericórdias.
issues.source: União das Misericórdias Portuguesas official website

issues.current: Это сеть независимых благотворительных организаций IPSS. Самая известная — Santa Casa da Misericórdia de Lisboa (SCML).
issues.problem: Saying all Misericórdias are simply IPSS is a useful simplification, but not fully precise. Many Misericórdias are IPSS or equivalent social-sector entities, while SCML has a special legal/statutory regime and is not just a normal local IPSS clinic.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Это сеть независимых благотворительных/social-sector организаций, многие из которых имеют статус IPSS или аналогичный статус. SCML в Лиссабоне — особый случай со своим правовым режимом.”
issues.source: Estatutos da Santa Casa da Misericórdia de Lisboa; Segurança Social/IPSS framework

issues.current: Попросите recibo/fatura с NIF — может пригодиться для IRS как despesa de saúde
issues.problem: Correct in spirit, but incomplete. In Portugal, health expenses are normally deductible only if correctly classified on e-Fatura; invoices with standard VAT rate may require validation/medical prescription to be accepted as health expenses.
issues.suggestion: Add: “Потом проверьте e-Fatura: медицинские расходы обычно проходят как saúde; если услуга с IVA 23%, для IRS может потребоваться receita médica/валидация.”
issues.source: Autoridade Tributária — e-Fatura / deduções de saúde IRS

missing_topics: Add a caveat to check whether the specific clinic/clinical service is registered with ERS and has Livro de Reclamações; Misericórdia as a charity does not automatically mean every health service is regulated or available to external patients.
Add an official source specifically for SNS registration/access by foreigners, because the guide gives practical legal-health advice about people without residence permit or número de utente.
Mention that prices in the guide are only illustrative and should be confirmed with the local price list/tabela de preços, because there is no national Misericórdia health tariff.
